info.title: ue4cli
info.description: Command line tools for Unreal Engine

commands.name: bpfl
commands.description: Add a function library to current module, if one does not exist.

commands.name: class
commands.description: Add new class to current module.

commands.name: dataasset
commands.description: Add a data asset class with given name.

commands.name: interface
commands.description: Add new interface to current module.

commands.name: module
commands.description: Add new module to current project or plugin.

commands.name: plugin
commands.description: Create and add new plugin to current project.

commands.name: project
commands.description: Create new project.

commands.name: tablerow
commands.description: Add a data table row struct with given name.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build project.

options.description: Dump configuration file to the console. (Optional)

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Clean project and plugins from build files.

commands.name: code
commands.description: Open Source Code Editor for current project.

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get value from config file.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set value in config file.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert copied clipboard data to json file.

commands.name: cook
commands.description: Cook project with cook settings.

options.description: Dump configuration file config to console. (Optional)

commands.name: create_config
commands.description: Create new or update old template config in current project or module.

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Launch UE4 diff tool to diff two files.

options.description: Optional @destinationsymbolic parameter from Plastic SCM diff to help find project folder when making diff. (Default: null)

commands.name: editor
commands.description: Open UE4 Editor for current project.

commands.name: all
commands.description: Fix all possible errors.

commands.name: dll_load
commands.description: Fix `Failed to load dll` errors.

commands.name: pch_cleanup
commands.description: Cleanup PCH file errors.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate Source Code Solution for current project.

commands.name: get_ue_root
commands.description: Get UE root of associated UE build.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize working environment, create Libraries.sln.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Open build log file.

commands.name: project
commands.description: Open project log folder.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.

commands.name: merge_lfs
commands.description: Launch UE4 diff tool to merge conflict file.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run commandlet.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List registered Unreal Engine uuid identifiers.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show project's Unreal Engine uuid identifier.
